storyHook: 入座看菜单，点餐上菜，吃完结账离开
storyBlurb: 周五晚上，小李要请同事吃顿川菜——朋友能吃辣，但不吃香菜。他提前订了靠窗的桌，推开玻璃门，服务员已经候在门口了。
storyScript:
【开场·入座看单】周五晚上七点半，甲和朋友推开玻璃门走进餐厅，服务员乙迎上前来，查了预订、带他们到靠窗的四人桌。甲接过菜单，翻了两页，心里盘算预算，悄悄问乙今天什么最鲜。乙低声说鱼是今天到的，还特别提醒红色的那道辣味可以备注减辣。

【进行·点餐问菜】甲和朋友商量着点：一个凉菜少辣、一个热菜不放香菜、一碟油炒蔬菜。乙记单时问清楚每道菜的备注，还主动说今天牛肉不错，甲想了想又加了一道。等待期间，两人隔着窗玻璃看街灯一盏盏亮起，餐厅里暖融融的。

【进行·上菜用餐】凉菜先来，甲夹了一块，点头说辣度刚好。热菜依次上桌，朋友扒了一碗饭之后说比上次那家好吃。甲笑着让乙再加一碗饭，乙回头说今晚牛肉是厨师特别推的，甲让朋友多吃两口。饭快吃完，朋友说肚子太撑，但还是把最后一块鱼吃完了。

【收束·结账告别】甲让乙结账，看到总额比预想的少三十块——因为凉菜今天特价。甲付了钱，收了小票，让乙把剩下的零头留着。走出餐厅，朋友说下次还来，甲说那就定好，提前订个窗边桌。

narrative.when: 周五晚上七点半，两人约在市中心吃饭
narrative.where: 临街中餐厅，靠窗四人桌
narrative.who: 甲（请客的客人）· 乙（餐厅服务员）
narrative.how: 提前电话留了位子，到店后看纸质菜单
narrative.method: 入座、看菜单、问菜、点菜、吃饭、要单结账、收小票
narrative.event: 甲想请朋友吃顿好的，但预算有限，得在好吃和省钱之间找平衡

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good evening. Do you have a booking?
turns.zh: 晚上好，请问有预订吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, under my name. Seven thirty, two of us.
turns.zh: 有的，我提前订了，七点半，两位。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, this way. Your window table is ready.
turns.zh: 好的，请跟我来，靠窗的桌子准备好了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh good — my friend likes a window seat.
turns.zh: 太好了，我朋友喜欢坐窗边。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here you are. I will leave two lists with you.
turns.zh: 这边请，我给你们放两份菜单。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. This place looks very good.
turns.zh: 谢谢，这地方看着不错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: We hope so. Take your time with the list.
turns.zh: 希望您喜欢，慢慢看，不用着急。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Quick question — what is good tonight?
turns.zh: 请问今天什么最好吃？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The fish came in today. Very good. And the cold meat plate is popular.
turns.zh: 鱼是今天到的，非常新鲜；凉菜那道卤肉也很受欢迎。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. One thing — my friend does not eat cilantro.
turns.zh: 好的，有一点要说——我朋友不吃香菜。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No cilantro. I will make a note. Anything else?
turns.zh: 不放香菜，我记下来，还有别的要求吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: She can not eat very spicy food. A little is fine, but not a lot.
turns.zh: 她不能吃太辣的，少辣可以，但不能多。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I can ask the cook to go easy on the spicy for any dish. Just say the word.
turns.zh: 每道菜都可以让厨师少放辣，您告诉我哪道要备注。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let me look at the list first. Give me five minutes.
turns.zh: 我先看一下菜单，给我五分钟。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Of course. I will come back when you are ready.
turns.zh: 当然，您准备好了叫我就行。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right — the cold plate first. The meat one, easy on the sharp.
turns.zh: 好，先来个凉菜——卤肉那道，少辣。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Cold meat plate, easy on the sharp. Got it.
turns.zh: 凉菜卤肉少辣，记下了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And the fish for a warm plate. No cilantro, as I said.
turns.zh: 热菜要那道鱼，不放香菜，就像我说的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Fish, no cilantro. Any other warm plates?
turns.zh: 鱼不放香菜，还要别的热菜吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What is the stir-fried vegetables? The one on the board.
turns.zh: 那个油炒蔬菜是什么？就是黑板上写的那道。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a green vegetable, cooked in good oil. A little sharp at the end.
turns.zh: 那是空心菜，用好油炒的，最后有一点点辣。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Sounds good. We will have one. Keep the sharp small.
turns.zh: 听起来不错，来一份，辣味少放点。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And tonight the beef is very good — the cook did it a special way.
turns.zh: 今晚的牛肉也很好——厨师用了特别的做法。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The beef? How much more would that be?
turns.zh: 牛肉？要多加多少钱？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Sixty eight. It comes with a warm sauce on the side.
turns.zh: 六十八，配一个热蘸酱。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: All right. Add the beef. My friend loves beef.
turns.zh: 行，加一道牛肉，我朋友最爱吃牛肉了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Beef with warm sauce. And to drink?
turns.zh: 牛肉配热蘸酱，饮料要什么？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Just water — two, no ice.
turns.zh: 就要水，两杯，不加冰。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Rice for two as well?
turns.zh: 好的，再来两份米饭吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, two rice. That should be everything.
turns.zh: 对，两碗米饭，应该齐了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let me read it back — cold meat plate easy sharp, fish no cilantro, vegetable small sharp, beef with sauce, two rice, two water.
turns.zh: 我复述一下——凉菜卤肉少辣、鱼不放香菜、空心菜少辣、牛肉配热酱、两碗饭、两杯水。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is right. You got it all.
turns.zh: 对的，都记住了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put the order in now. The cold plate will come first, about five minutes.
turns.zh: 我现在去下单，凉菜大概五分钟先上。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. We are in no hurry tonight.
turns.zh: 好的，我们今晚不赶时间。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here is your water.
turns.zh: 给你们水来了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. This room has a nice feeling.
turns.zh: 谢谢。这个地方氛围挺好的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: We like it. We have been here eight years.
turns.zh: 我们也喜欢，这家已经开了八年了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Eight years! We walked past before but never came in.
turns.zh: 八年！我们之前路过几次但一直没进来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, you are here now. I will check on your order.
turns.zh: 现在来了就好，我去看看您的菜。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take your time.
turns.zh: 不用着急。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here is your cold plate — meat, easy sharp. I told the cook no cilantro for every dish.
turns.zh: 凉菜来了——卤肉少辣，我跟厨师说了每道菜都不放香菜。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You remembered everything. Thank you.
turns.zh: 你把所有备注都记住了，谢谢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Of course. I hope you enjoy it.
turns.zh: 应该的，希望您喜欢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: This cold plate is very good. The colour alone looks right.
turns.zh: 这凉菜看着就好，光颜色就对了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The cook uses an old way for the cold plate. Been the same for years.
turns.zh: 厨师做凉菜用的是老方子，多年没变过。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: My friend already cleaned half the plate. That is the best sign.
turns.zh: 我朋友已经吃掉一半了，这是最好的评价。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Ha! I will let the cook know.
turns.zh: 哈！我去告诉厨师。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not too sharp at all — just enough. She was worried.
turns.zh: 辣度刚好，一点不过头——她之前还担心呢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here is the fish plate. Mind — the dish is warm.
turns.zh: 鱼来了，注意盘子烫。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, it smells very good.
turns.zh: 哦，闻着真香。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Fresh today. No cilantro, as you asked.
turns.zh: 今天到的鱼，香菜没放，按您说的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The fish is soft. And the sauce has a good depth.
turns.zh: 鱼肉很嫩，酱也有层次。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is the cook's own sauce. He has been making it since we opened.
turns.zh: 那是厨师自己调的酱，从开店就用到现在。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I can tell. It is different from other places.
turns.zh: 能尝出来，跟其他地方不一样。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here is the vegetable. Small sharp, as you asked.
turns.zh: 空心菜来了，少放辣，按您说的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The oil smells like it was made here.
turns.zh: 这个油香，感觉是自己做的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is. Old way. Been the same since we opened.
turns.zh: 没错，老方法，从开店就是这个味道。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You keep saying that. This place has its own way of doing things.
turns.zh: 你一直提这个，这家店有自己的坚持。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Eight years of the same way. Some things should not change.
turns.zh: 八年如一，有些东西就是不该变。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I agree. And here is the beef — we almost forgot.
turns.zh: 我同意。牛肉来了，差点忘了还有这道。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here is the beef plate. Warm sauce on the side.
turns.zh: 牛肉来了，热酱放旁边。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: My friend stopped eating the fish to look at it.
turns.zh: 我朋友放下鱼筷子看这道了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The cook will be happy to hear that.
turns.zh: 厨师知道了会很高兴的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Can we have more rice? One more cup, please.
turns.zh: 可以再加一碗饭吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Of course. Right away.
turns.zh: 当然，马上来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I said we would not eat too much tonight.
turns.zh: 我说今晚不多吃的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Ha. You said that five minutes ago.
turns.zh: 哈，您五分钟前才说的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Exactly. And now we need more rice.
turns.zh: 就是啊，结果还是要加饭。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here is your extra rice. And more water?
turns.zh: 加饭来了，再加点水吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Please. This meal is going very well.
turns.zh: 要，谢谢，这顿饭吃得非常好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am glad. Is everything to your taste?
turns.zh: 我很高兴听到，每道都合口味吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Better than I hoped. The beef is the best thing on the table.
turns.zh: 比我预期的还好，牛肉是这桌最好的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is the cook's favourite to make. He puts a lot of time into it.
turns.zh: 这是厨师最喜欢做的一道，他花了很多心思。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Tell him it worked. My friend put her bowl down and just ate the beef for five minutes.
turns.zh: 告诉他成功了——我朋友放下碗，光吃牛肉吃了五分钟。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Ha! I will. Do you have room for something sweet?
turns.zh: 哈！我会转告，还有地方吃点甜的吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What do you have?
turns.zh: 你们有什么甜品？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Cold sweet rice in a small cup, and a fruit plate with what is in season.
turns.zh: 有小杯的甜米糊，还有一个当季水果拼盘。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: My friend says sweet rice. She always goes for the sweet things.
turns.zh: 我朋友说要甜米糊，她一向爱吃甜的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Two cups?
turns.zh: 两杯吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Two cups. We said no dessert but here we are.
turns.zh: 两杯，我们说好不吃甜品的，还是点了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Ha. That is often how it goes.
turns.zh: 哈，经常这样。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here are the sweet rice cups — cold and very sweet.
turns.zh: 甜米糊来了——好凉好甜。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Glad you like it.
turns.zh: 您喜欢就好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: This has been a very good meal. Better than the last three places I brought her.
turns.zh: 这顿饭吃得太满意了，比上次带她去的三家都好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are very kind. Would you like to see the paper now?
turns.zh: 您太客气了，现在要看单子吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, when you are ready.
turns.zh: 好，您准备好了就拿过来吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One moment.
turns.zh: 稍等一下。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The street lights look nice from here. My friend kept looking out all evening.
turns.zh: 从这里看街灯很好看，我朋友一晚上一直往外看。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The window table is always the first to go. Good that you booked it.
turns.zh: 靠窗的桌子总是最先订出去的，幸好你提前定了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I almost forgot to book. Lucky I remembered this morning.
turns.zh: 我差点忘记订，幸好早上想起来了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here is your paper. Two hundred and eight in all.
turns.zh: 单子来了，一共二百零八。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Two hundred and eight? I thought it would be more.
turns.zh: 二百零八？我以为要更多的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The cold plate is on special today — thirty off. It worked in your favour.
turns.zh: 今天凉菜特价，减了三十块，帮您省了点。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a nice surprise. Here is two fifty — keep the change.
turns.zh: 意外之喜，给你二百五，零头不用找了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you very much. Do you need a receipt?
turns.zh: 非常感谢，需要小票吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes please — for the record.
turns.zh: 要，留个记录。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One moment. Here is your receipt.
turns.zh: 稍等，小票来了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. My friend wants to come back next week.
turns.zh: 谢谢，我朋友说下周还要来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Please do. We are open every day.
turns.zh: 欢迎，我们每天都开门。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Can you keep the window table for us? Same name.
turns.zh: 能帮我们留住这个靠窗的桌子吗？同一个名字。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put it down now. What day?
turns.zh: 我现在记，哪天？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Friday again. Seven thirty.
turns.zh: 还是周五，七点半。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Window table, Friday, seven thirty. I have it.
turns.zh: 靠窗桌，周五，七点半，记下了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And please tell the cook — the beef was the best thing we have had in a long time.
turns.zh: 还有请帮我转告厨师——牛肉是我们好久没吃到这么好的了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will tell him tonight. He will be very pleased.
turns.zh: 我今晚就告诉他，他会很高兴的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And no cilantro next Friday. My friend will remember if you forget.
turns.zh: 下周五也别放香菜，我朋友记性好，你要是忘了她会说的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Ha! I have it in the notes already. No cilantro.
turns.zh: 哈！我备注里已经写了，不放香菜。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Perfect. Thank you for tonight.
turns.zh: 太好了，感谢今晚的服务。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It was our pleasure. Have a good evening.
turns.zh: 我们也很高兴招待您，晚上好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good night. See you Friday.
turns.zh: 晚安，周五见。
